\tzpentry{ID4415}{Quantum Angular Velocity Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4415 introduces Quantum Angular Velocity Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} U_{\Omega}(t) = \int \mathcal{D}[\Psi]\, \exp\!\left( \frac{i}{\hbar} \int_0^t \Hhat_{\Omega}[\Psi(\tau)]\,\mathrm{d}\tau \right), \end{equation}
